items.caption: A cover of time magazine featuring a political illustration. the central figures are a young girl in a pink jacket and a man in a dark suit, who appears to be president donald trump. the girl is standing in front of the man, looking up at him with a sad expression. the background is a solid red color. the text on the magazine reads "time" at the top and "welcome to america" at the bottom, with the phrase "the latest cover of time magazine depicts president <person>'s immigrant family separation policy by showing <person> towering over a crying migrant child and staring down at her." suggesting a commentary on the president's policy on immigration.
